channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Double Yellow Lines worn away, 25th March
item.description:
Full length of Fairmount Rd. There is a large nursery in Fairmount Rd, which leads to large volumes of traffic at drop off and pick up times. Due to the double yellow lines being worn away, parents using the nursery park over pavements etc which leads to small children having to go into the road and around the badly parked cars. I witnessed an incident yesterday which almost led to a child being hit. A child is going to get seriously injured if this issue is not resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-6, Fairmount Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:

item.title: Tree has died following pruning, 25th March
item.description:
The tree was overpruned and has now died. Ideally needs replacing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Monica Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Possible fallen tree, resting on tree on opposite side of road., 25th March
item.description:
There is a possible fallen tree resting on another tree on the opposite side of the road, it does look like it has fallen there with Telephone lines in between the branches. The position according What Three Words is ///revise.enough.faster

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement crushed, 25th March
item.description:
Pavement corner outside No 2 Clyde Road now broken up and depressed by vehicles driving on it to avoid huge pothole in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 25th March
item.description:
The bin at ///balconies.football.sensibly is overflowing - rubbish all over the football field.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 25th March
item.description:
Small Damaged Tree. ( Needs Clearing from Fence) TM: Give and Take (Temporary footway closure). ENWD The side of No 7 (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 25th March
item.description:
Overgrown hedge (Moss needs clearing on FW). 25 Mtrs x 1000mm. TM: Give and Take Next to lamp post No 4 (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th March

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 25th March
item.description:
FW: Abrupt Level Difference (Paving block sunken Next to Mains Water tap). (Lift and reset) 100mmx130mmx23mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Next to No 6 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet
